title: cotinus radicans
intro: Cotinus radicans, also known as the American smoke tree, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves, bark, and roots have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits like antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Cotinus radicans can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
